headline: Transcript: France’s bond market sell-off
summary: Josh Gabert-Doyon talks to Ian Smith and Jude Webber
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘France’s bond market sell-off’

Josh Gabert-DoyonGood morning from the Financial Times. Today is Friday, November 29th. And this is your FT News Briefing. Russia is threatening Kyiv with hypersonic missiles. French bond market takes a tumble after budget concerns. Ireland heads to the polls and one Dublin constituency has a rather colourful set of candidates. Plus, Hong Kong plans tax breaks for crypto. I’m Josh Gabert-Doyon and here’s the news you need to start your day.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

President Vladimir Putin has threatened to use Russia’s new hypersonic ballistic missiles to turn targets in Kyiv to dust. That includes decision-making centres. Putin said this would be in response to Ukraine using western long-range missiles against targets within Russia. The advanced missiles Moscow first deployed last week could destroy highly protected underground sites, Putin said, adding that Russia had started mass producti
